tools.name: news_events_explain_market_move
tools.description:
[Read] Explain what drove a crypto asset's price move in a given time window.
Returns a concise summary (from real-time Tavily search), the latest high-priority real-time events, and supporting internal event pool items, plus data-completeness status.
This tool is a data aggregator; the downstream a

tools.name: news_events_get_event_detail
tools.description: [Read] Full detail for one event_id only, including persisted impact_direction and impact_direction_reason. Filtered event list or timeline -> get_latest_events. Unknown id returns not found.

tools.name: news_events_get_latest_events
tools.description: [Read] Filtered event list or timeline; each row includes event_id and persisted impact_direction/impact_direction_reason. Optional direction filter. One event_id detail -> get_event_detail. Headline/news feed -> search_news.

tools.name: news_events_get_market_move_report
tools.description: [Read] Query a stored market-move attribution report by symbol, optional report_id, or optional event_id. Lookup priority is report_id > event_id > latest report for symbol. Returned event/report timestamps are UTC0 unless the field name ends in _utc8. This tool never requests report regeneration an

tools.name: news_events_list_market_move_reports
tools.description: [Read] List stored market-move attribution reports for one symbol, filtering by an inclusive UTC0 updated_at range and sorting results by event_time descending. Reports may be updated after their market event, so updated_at can be later than event_time. Timezone-less inputs are UTC0; inputs with an

tools.name: news_feed_get_exchange_announcements
tools.description: [Read] Venue-published exchange notices: listings, delistings, maintenance. Media rumors or general crypto headlines -> search_news.

tools.name: news_feed_get_hot_topics
tools.description: [Read] Get the top 2-4 social discussion themes for one coin over the latest 4h, including direction, influence, sentiment, platforms, and representative evidence posts. For arbitrary social search use search_ugc; for X/Twitter-only narrative research use search_x.

tools.name: news_feed_get_mention_burst
tools.description: [Read] Get a coin's 24h multi-platform social mention burst signal, growth, sentiment direction, platform breakdown, and display eligibility. For general sentiment ratios and sample tweets use get_social_sentiment; for individual social discussions use search_ugc.

tools.name: news_feed_get_social_sentiment
tools.description: [Read] Aggregate per-coin social sentiment for a time range: overall sentiment, positive/negative split, mention count, and sample tweets. X/Twitter post search or tweet-level evidence -> search_x. Multi-platform social thread search -> search_ugc.

tools.name: news_feed_search_news
tools.description: [Read] Search the platform news index for headlines, news items, and briefing-style result lists. Open-web research with synthesized answers and cited external pages -> web_search. Event catalog with event_id -> get_latest_events.

tools.name: news_feed_search_ugc
tools.description: [Read] Reddit/Discord/Telegram/YouTube-style UGC: non-empty query uses vector API; coin without query uses OpenSearch. Both empty invalid. X/Twitter narrative -> search_x; headlines -> search_news. Not macro economic statistics; not structured event list -> get_latest_events.

tools.name: news_feed_search_x
tools.description: [Read] Search and analyze X/Twitter discussions for a topic, with tweet-level evidence and cited posts. Aggregate social mood, sentiment score, or positive/negative split -> get_social_sentiment. Open-web pages -> web_search. Multi-platform social search -> search_ugc.

tools.name: news_feed_web_search
tools.description: [Read] Search the open web and return a synthesized answer with cited external pages. Built-in headline lookup, news-item search, or briefing-style news list -> search_news. X/Twitter-only discussion or tweet evidence -> search_x.

tools.name: news_prediction_get_event_signal
tools.description: [Read] Single event signal from dws_external_event_signal_hf by event_ref (venue:venue_event_id). window 1h/24h/7d (default 24h). Returns outcome_probabilities, volume_flow, directional_context, optional markets[] (default include_markets=true). depth_summary always null—use get_market_orderbook for

tools.name: news_prediction_get_fastest_rising_ranking
tools.description: [Read] Daily venue/overall ranking by probability rise (UTC rank_date). Optional venue[], category, status (same as volume_delta ranking). Drops rows missing open_mid_probability_utc or probability_delta_today. Requires predictionRankIndex.

tools.name: news_prediction_get_market_orderbook
tools.description: [Read] Live current order book only (mode=current). depth 1-20 (default 20). polymarket: market_id=venue_market_id; needs opensearch.predictionMarketIndex for token lookup (else not_implemented); yes/no CLOB /book in parallel—partial if one side fails, tool error only if both fail. predict_fun: offi

tools.name: news_prediction_get_volume_delta_ranking
tools.description: [Read] Daily venue/overall ranking by volume delta (UTC rank_date). Optional venue[], category (exact term on rank index), status (active/closed/resolved/all; default active). Requires opensearch.predictionRankIndex.

tools.name: news_prediction_search_events
tools.description: [Read] Search prediction events on opensearch.predictionEventSignalIndex (dws_prediction_event_signal_hf alias, hourly UNIQUE part_hour+venue+venue_event_id). query/coin/category optional; coin-only unsupported_filter. status filters event_status; status_tags from status_json_array. sort recently_li

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "news_prediction_get_market_orderbook" references sensitive artifacts (apikey). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: [Read] Live current order book only (mode=current). depth 1-20 (default 20). polymarket: market_id=venue_market_id; needs opensearch.predictionMarketIndex for t…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "news" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: news_events_get_latest_events, news_feed_get_exchange_announcements, news_feed_get_hot_topics, news_feed_get_mention_burst, news_feed_get_social_sentiment, news_feed_search_news, news_feed_search_ugc, news_feed_search_x, news_feed_web_search · Private data: news_prediction_get_market_orderbook · Public sink: news_feed_get_social_sentiment, news_feed_search_x, news_feed_web_search.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: news_events_get_latest_events, news_feed_get_exchange_announcements, news_feed_get_hot_topics, news_feed_get_mention_burst, news_feed_get_social_sentiment, news_feed_search_news, news_feed_search_ugc, news_feed_search_x, news_feed_web_search · Private data: news_prediction_get_market_orderbook · Public sink: news_feed_get_social_sentiment, news_feed_search_x, news_feed_web_search

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "news_events_get_event_detail" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "[Read] Full detail for one event_id only. Filtered event list or timeline -> get_latest_events. Unknown id returns not found." → after: "[Read] Full detail for one event_id only, including persisted impact_direction and impact_direction_reason. Filtered event list or timeline -> get_latest_events. Unknown id returns not found."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "news_events_get_latest_events" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "[Read] Filtered event list or timeline; each row includes event_id. One event_id detail -> get_event_detail. Headline/news feed -> search_news." → after: "[Read] Filtered event list or timeline; each row includes event_id and persisted impact_direction/impact_direction_reason. Optional direction filter. One event_id detail -> get_event_detail. Headline/news feed -> search_news."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
